asciichat_errno.c(3) Library Functions Manual asciichat_errno.c(3)

NAME

asciichat_errno.c - 🚨 Custom error code system with formatted messages, thread-local storage, and errno mapping

SYNOPSIS

Macros


#define MAX_THREAD_ERRORS 64

Functions


void log_labeled (const char *label, log_color_t color, const char *message,...)
void asciichat_set_errno (asciichat_error_t code, const char *file, int line, const char *function, const char *context_message)
void asciichat_set_errno_with_message (asciichat_error_t code, const char *file, int line, const char *function, const char *format,...)
void asciichat_set_errno_with_system_error (asciichat_error_t code, const char *file, int line, const char *function, int sys_errno)
void asciichat_set_errno_with_system_error_and_message (asciichat_error_t code, const char *file, int line, const char *function, int sys_errno, const char *format,...)
void asciichat_set_errno_with_wsa_error (asciichat_error_t code, const char *file, int line, const char *function, int wsa_error)
bool asciichat_has_wsa_error (void)
bool asciichat_has_errno (asciichat_error_context_t *context)
void asciichat_clear_errno (void)
asciichat_error_t asciichat_get_errno (void)
void asciichat_fatal_with_context (asciichat_error_t code, const char *file, int line, const char *function, const char *format,...)
void asciichat_print_error_context (const asciichat_error_context_t *context)
void asciichat_error_stats_init (void)
void asciichat_error_stats_record (asciichat_error_t code)
void asciichat_error_stats_print (void)
void asciichat_error_stats_reset (void)
asciichat_error_stats_t asciichat_error_stats_get (void)
asciichat_error_t asciichat_get_thread_error (int thread_id)
void asciichat_set_thread_error (int thread_id, asciichat_error_t code)
void asciichat_clear_thread_error (int thread_id)
void asciichat_errno_suppress (bool suppress)
void asciichat_errno_destroy (void)

Variables


__thread asciichat_error_context_t asciichat_errno_context
__thread asciichat_error_t asciichat_errno = ASCIICHAT_OK

Detailed Description

🚨 Custom error code system with formatted messages, thread-local storage, and errno mapping

Definition in file asciichat_errno.c.

Macro Definition Documentation

#define MAX_THREAD_ERRORS 64

Definition at line 64 of file asciichat_errno.c.

Referenced by asciichat_clear_thread_error(), asciichat_get_thread_error(), and asciichat_set_thread_error().

Function Documentation

void asciichat_clear_errno (void )

Definition at line 233 of file asciichat_errno.c.

233                                  {
234   if (asciichat_errno_context.context_message) {
235     SAFE_FREE(asciichat_errno_context.context_message);
236     asciichat_errno_context.context_message = NULL;
237   }
238 
239   backtrace_t_free(&asciichat_errno_context.backtrace);
240 
241   memset(&asciichat_errno_context, 0, sizeof(asciichat_errno_context));
242   asciichat_errno_context.code = ASCIICHAT_OK;
243   asciichat_errno_context.system_errno = 0;
244   asciichat_errno_context.has_system_error = false;
245   asciichat_errno_context.has_wsa_error = false;
246   asciichat_errno_context.wsa_error = 0;
247 
248   /* Clear platform-specific error state */
249   platform_clear_error_state();
250 }




References asciichat_errno_context,
    backtrace_t_free(), platform_clear_error_state(), and
    SAFE_FREE.






void
  asciichat_clear_thread_error (int thread_id)


Definition at line 477 of file
  asciichat_errno.c.


477                                                  {
478   for (int i = 0; i < MAX_THREAD_ERRORS; i++) {
479     if (thread_errors[i].valid && thread_errors[i].thread_id == thread_id) {
480       thread_errors[i].valid = false;
481       break;
482     }
483   }
484 }

void
  asciichat_errno_destroy (void )


Definition at line 495 of file
  asciichat_errno.c.


495                                    {
496   backtrace_t_free(&asciichat_errno_context.backtrace);
497 
498   if (asciichat_errno_context.context_message != NULL) {
499     SAFE_FREE(asciichat_errno_context.context_message);
500   }
501 
502   // Reset the context to a clean state
503   memset(&asciichat_errno_context, 0, sizeof(asciichat_errno_context));
504   asciichat_errno_context.code = ASCIICHAT_OK;
505 
506   // Suppress any further error context allocation to prevent cleanup-phase leaks
507   // This prevents other atexit() functions from allocating new contexts after we've cleaned up
508   g_suppress_error_context = true;
509 }






References asciichat_errno_context,
    backtrace_t_free(), and SAFE_FREE.

    client_audio_render_thread(), client_receive_thread(),
    client_send_thread_func(), client_video_render_thread(), and
    stats_logger_thread().

asciichat_error_stats_t
  asciichat_error_stats_get (void )


Definition at line 431 of file
  asciichat_errno.c.


431                                                         {
432   if (!lifecycle_is_initialized(&g_error_stats.lifecycle)) {
433     lifecycle_init(&g_error_stats.lifecycle, "error_stats");
434   }
435 
436   mutex_lock(&g_error_stats.mutex);
437   asciichat_error_stats_t result = g_error_stats.stats;
438   mutex_unlock(&g_error_stats.mutex);
439 
440   return result;
441 }

void
  asciichat_error_stats_init (void )

  asciichat_errno.c.


359                                       {

void
  asciichat_error_stats_print (void )


Definition at line 382 of file
  asciichat_errno.c.


382                                        {
383   if (!lifecycle_is_initialized(&g_error_stats.lifecycle)) {
384     log_plain("No errors recorded.\n");
385     return;
386   }
387 
388   mutex_lock(&g_error_stats.mutex);
389 
390   if (g_error_stats.stats.total_errors == 0) {
391     mutex_unlock(&g_error_stats.mutex);
392     log_plain("No errors recorded.\n");
393     return;
394   }
395 
396   // Copy stats to local variable to minimize lock hold time
397   asciichat_error_stats_t local_stats = g_error_stats.stats;
398   mutex_unlock(&g_error_stats.mutex);
399 
400   log_plain("\n=== ascii-chat Error Statistics ===\n");
401   log_plain("Total errors: %llu\n", (unsigned long long)local_stats.total_errors);
402 
403   if (local_stats.last_error_time > 0) {
404     time_t sec = (time_t)(local_stats.last_error_time / NS_PER_MS_INT);
405     struct tm tm_info;
406     if (platform_localtime(&sec, &tm_info) == ASCIICHAT_OK) {
407       char time_str[64];
408       strftime(time_str, sizeof(time_str), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S", &tm_info);
409       log_plain("Last error: %s (code %d)\n", time_str, (int)local_stats.last_error_code);
410     }
411   }
412 
413   log_plain("\nError breakdown:\n");
414   for (int i = 0; i < 256; i++) {
415     if (local_stats.error_counts[i] > 0) {
416       log_plain("  %3d (%s): %llu\n", i, asciichat_error_string((asciichat_error_t)i),
417                 (unsigned long long)local_stats.error_counts[i]);
418     }
419   }
420   log_plain("\n");
421 }






References lifecycle_is_initialized(), and
    platform_localtime().


Referenced by server_main(), and
    stats_logger_thread().






void
  asciichat_error_stats_record (asciichat_error_t code)


Definition at line 365 of file
  asciichat_errno.c.


365                                                           {
366   if (!lifecycle_is_initialized(&g_error_stats.lifecycle)) {
367     lifecycle_init(&g_error_stats.lifecycle, "error_stats");
368   }
369 
370   mutex_lock(&g_error_stats.mutex);
371 
372   if (code >= 0 && code < 256) {
373     g_error_stats.stats.error_counts[code]++;
374   }
375   g_error_stats.stats.total_errors++;
376   g_error_stats.stats.last_error_time = time_ns_to_us(time_get_realtime_ns());
377   g_error_stats.stats.last_error_code = code;
378 
379   mutex_unlock(&g_error_stats.mutex);
380 }






References lifecycle_init(),
    lifecycle_is_initialized(), and time_get_realtime_ns().

void
  asciichat_fatal_with_context (asciichat_error_t code, const char * file, int
  line, const char * function, const char * format, ...)


Definition at line 261 of file
  asciichat_errno.c.


262                                                            {
263   (void)file;
264   (void)line;
265   (void)function;
266 
267   // Print library error context if available
268   asciichat_error_context_t err_ctx;
269   if (HAS_ERRNO(&err_ctx)) {
270     log_labeled("\nasciichat_errno: libary code error context", LOG_COLOR_ERROR, "");
271     asciichat_print_error_context(&err_ctx);
272   } else {
273     log_plain("WARNING: No error context found (asciichat_errno_context.code=%d)", asciichat_errno_context.code);
274   }
275 
276   safe_fprintf(stderr, "\n");
277   log_labeled("FATAL ERROR", LOG_COLOR_FATAL, "exit code %d (%s)", (int)code, asciichat_error_string(code));
278 #ifndef NDEBUG
279   const char *relative_file = extract_project_relative_path(file);
280   log_plain("  Location: %s:%d in %s()", relative_file, line, function);
281 #endif
282 
283   if (format) {
284     va_list args;
285     va_start(args, format);
286     char *formatted_message = format_message(format, args);
287     log_plain("  Error message: %s", formatted_message);
288     SAFE_FREE(formatted_message);
289     va_end(args);
290   }
291 
292 #ifndef NDEBUG
293   // Always print platform backtrace in debug/dev builds
294   backtrace_t bt = {0};
295   backtrace_capture_and_symbolize(&bt);
296   if (bt.count > 0) {
297     backtrace_print("\nFATAL BACKTRACE", &bt, 0, 0, skip_backtrace_frame);
298     backtrace_t_free(&bt);
299   }
300 #endif
301 
302   exit(code);
303 }






References args, asciichat_errno_context,
    asciichat_print_error_context(),
    backtrace_capture_and_symbolize(), backtrace_print(),
    backtrace_t_free(), extract_project_relative_path(),
    format_message(), log_labeled(), safe_fprintf(), and
    SAFE_FREE.

  asciichat_get_thread_error (int thread_id)

  asciichat_errno.c.

452     }
453   }

bool asciichat_has_errno (asciichat_error_context_t *
  context)


Definition at line 221 of file
  asciichat_errno.c.


221                                                              {
222   if (asciichat_errno_context.code == ASCIICHAT_OK) {
223     return false;
224   }
225 
226   if (context) {
227     *context = asciichat_errno_context;
228   }
229 
230   return true;
231 }

void
  asciichat_print_error_context (const asciichat_error_context_t *
  context)


Definition at line 310 of file
  asciichat_errno.c.


310                                                                              {
311   if (!context || context->code == ASCIICHAT_OK) {
312     return;
313   }
314 
315   if (context->file && context->line && context->function) {
316     log_plain("  Location: %s:%d in %s()", extract_project_relative_path(context->file), context->line,
317               context->function);
318   } else {
319     log_plain("  Location: unknown (set by system code)");
320   }
321 
322   if (context->context_message) {
323     safe_fprintf(stderr, "  %s %s\n", colored_string(LOG_COLOR_WARN, "Context:"), context->context_message);
324     log_file("  Context: %s", context->context_message);
325   }
326 
327   if (context->has_system_error) {
328     log_plain("  System error: %s (code: %d, meaning: %s)", SAFE_STRERROR(context->system_errno), context->system_errno,
329               SAFE_STRERROR(context->system_errno));
330   }
331 
332   // Print timestamp
333   if (context->timestamp > 0) {
334     time_t sec = (time_t)(context->timestamp / NS_PER_MS_INT);
335     long usec = (long)(context->timestamp % NS_PER_MS_INT);
336     struct tm tm_info;
337     if (platform_localtime(&sec, &tm_info) == ASCIICHAT_OK) {
338       char time_str[64];
339       (void)strftime(time_str, sizeof(time_str), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S", &tm_info);
340       log_plain("  Timestamp: %s.%06ld", time_str, usec);
341     }
342   }
343 
344   // Print stack trace from library error
345   if (context->backtrace.count > 0) {
346     // Symbolize backtrace only when actually printing it (not at capture time)
347     backtrace_symbolize(&context->backtrace);
348     if (context->backtrace.symbols) {
349       backtrace_print("\nBacktrace from library error", &context->backtrace, 0, 0, skip_backtrace_frame);
350     }
351   }
352 }






References backtrace_print(), backtrace_symbolize(),
    colored_string(), extract_project_relative_path(),
    platform_localtime(), and safe_fprintf().


Referenced by asciichat_fatal_with_context().






void
  asciichat_set_errno (asciichat_error_t code, const char * file, int line,
  const char * function, const char * context_message)


Definition at line 113 of file
  asciichat_errno.c.


114                                                       {
115   // Suppress error context allocation during cleanup to prevent leaks
116   if (g_suppress_error_context) {
117     return;
118   }
119 
120   // Clear any existing context message
121   if (asciichat_errno_context.context_message) {
122     SAFE_FREE(asciichat_errno_context.context_message);
123     asciichat_errno_context.context_message = NULL;
124   }
125 
126   // Set the error context
127   asciichat_errno_context.code = code;
128   asciichat_errno_context.file = file;
129   asciichat_errno_context.line = line;
130   asciichat_errno_context.function = function;
131   asciichat_errno_context.timestamp = time_ns_to_us(time_get_realtime_ns());
132   asciichat_errno_context.has_system_error = false;
133 
134   // Set the simple error code variable
135   asciichat_errno = code;
136 
137   // Copy context message if provided
138   if (context_message == NULL) {
139     log_error("context_message is NULL");
140     const char *fallback = "No context message (this is invalid - set a context message)";
141     size_t len = strlen(fallback) + 1;
142     asciichat_errno_context.context_message = SAFE_MALLOC(len, char *);
143     if (asciichat_errno_context.context_message) {
144       SAFE_STRNCPY(asciichat_errno_context.context_message, fallback, len);
145     } else {
146       log_error("SAFE_MALLOC failed for fallback context_message");
147     }
148   } else {
149     size_t len = strlen(context_message) + 1;
150     asciichat_errno_context.context_message = SAFE_MALLOC(len, char *);
151     if (asciichat_errno_context.context_message) {
152       SAFE_STRNCPY(asciichat_errno_context.context_message, context_message, len);
153     } else {
154       log_error("SAFE_MALLOC failed for context_message");
155     }
156   }
157 
158   // Capture stack trace in debug builds
159   backtrace_t_free(&asciichat_errno_context.backtrace);
160   capture_backtrace(&asciichat_errno_context.backtrace);
161 
162   // Record in statistics
163   asciichat_error_stats_record(code);
164 }






References asciichat_errno, asciichat_errno_context,
    asciichat_error_stats_record(), backtrace_t_free(),
    SAFE_FREE, SAFE_MALLOC, and time_get_realtime_ns().

void
  asciichat_set_thread_error (int thread_id, asciichat_error_t code)


Definition at line 457 of file
  asciichat_errno.c.


457                                                                        {
458   // Find existing entry or empty slot
459   int slot = -1;
460   for (int i = 0; i < MAX_THREAD_ERRORS; i++) {
461     if (thread_errors[i].valid && thread_errors[i].thread_id == thread_id) {
462       slot = i;
463       break;
464     }
465     if (!thread_errors[i].valid && slot == -1) {
466       slot = i;
467     }
468   }
469 
470   if (slot >= 0) {
471     thread_errors[slot].thread_id = thread_id;
472     thread_errors[slot].error_code = code;
473     thread_errors[slot].valid = true;
474   }
475 }






References MAX_THREAD_ERRORS, thread_id, and
    valid.

  log_labeled (const char * label, log_color_t color, const char *
